use_cases: Hero section display card with animated 3D spirals for landing pages
Premium feature showcase cards in SaaS dashboards
Interactive product cards with dynamic visual effects for e-commerce
Decorative portfolio or gallery cards with continuous animation
Feature highlight cards for fintech or media applications
ai_summary: An interactive 3D card component built with React Three Fiber featuring animated spiral patterns that grow and rotate continuously. The card supports customizable colors via props and creates a premium visual showcase effect. Ideal for hero sections, feature highlights, or any context requiring eye-catching animated card elements with a sophisticated 3D aesthetic.
